description: LitigationOS MCP v4 — Convergence & Combat Intelligence Layer (7 tools)

convergence.description: Convergence cycle quality scoring, gap tracking, and emergence detection

combat.description: Filing priority, impeachment packages, and adversarial vulnerability analysis

tools.name: litigation_convergence_status
tools.description: Get current convergence quality score (0-100), lane readiness, gap counts (BLOCKER/DNEW/NEXT_PATCH), emergence event count, and cycle mode. Returns COURTROOM_READY, NEAR_READY, IN_PROGRESS, or CRITICAL status.

tools.name: litigation_egcp_score
tools.description: Get EGCP (Evidence/Grounds/Citations/Presentation) scores per case lane. Each component 0-25, total 0-100. Scores ≥65 indicate filing readiness. Returns component breakdown and lane status.

lane.description: Case lane: 'A_CUSTODY', 'B_HOUSING', 'C_FEDERAL', 'D_PPO', 'E_MISCONDUCT', or 'F_APPELLATE'. Omit for all.

tools.name: litigation_gap_tracker
tools.description: Query convergence gaps — BLOCKERs preventing filing, DNEW discoveries, and deferred NEXT_PATCH items. Prioritized by severity. Filter by type, lane, severity, or resolution status.

gap_type.description: Gap classification: 'BLOCKER', 'DNEW', or 'NEXT_PATCH'. Omit for all.

lane.description: Case lane filter. Omit for all lanes.

tools.name: litigation_emergence_scan
tools.description: Detect cross-lane emergence patterns: entity overlap (CROSS_GRAPH), authority completion (CHAIN_COMPLETE), contradictions (CONTRADICTION), novel strategies (NOVEL_STRATEGY), witness overlap (WITNESS_OVERLAP). Novelty 7+ requires attorney review.

signal_type.description: Signal type filter. Omit for all types.

min_novelty.description: Minimum novelty score 1-10. Use 7+ for high-significance only.

tools.name: litigation_filing_priority
tools.description: Ranked filing priority matrix combining EGCP scores, urgency, impeachment support, and red team vulnerabilities. Returns composite priority score per filing with READY/DEVELOPING status.

lane.description: Filter to specific lane. Omit for full matrix.

tools.name: litigation_impeachment_lookup
tools.description: Query impeachment packages — prior inconsistent statements, contradictions, and MRE-mapped evidence for cross-examination. Filter by target name, lane, or severity.

target.description: Target name (partial match, e.g., 'Watson'). Omit for all.

lane.description: Case lane filter. Omit for all lanes.

tools.name: litigation_red_team_findings
tools.description: Adversarial red team findings — vulnerabilities opposing counsel would exploit. Includes attack vector, severity, affected lane, and recommended mitigation. CRITICAL findings must be resolved before filing.

lane.description: Affected lane filter. Omit for all.

category.description: Attack category (e.g., 'Judicial Immunity', 'Hearsay'). Omit for all.
